pkgmetadata.longdescription: pyddqPython API of Drunken Data Quality.httpsgithub.comFRosnerdrunken-data-qualityDescriptionDDQ is a small library for checking constraints on Spark data structures.It can be used to assure a certain data quality, especially when continuous imports happen.NoteThis project has been set up using PyScaffold 2.5.6. For details and usageinformation on PyScaffold see httppyscaffold.readthedocs.org.
